testcase.classname: campaign moderation note SQL restricts moderation notes to managers and pending campaigns
testcase.name: campaign moderation note SQL restricts moderation notes to managers and pending campaigns
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf
Expected substring: "Only managers can add moderation notes" Received string: "create or replace function app_public.add_campaign_moderation_note( campaign_id uuid, body text ) returns app_public.campaign_moderation_note language plpgsql as $$ declare v_note app_public.campaign_moderation_note; v_manager_account_id uuid; v_campaign_status app_public.campaign_moderation_status; begin if not app_private.is_admin() then raise exception using message = 'Only admins can add moderation notes'; end if;· v_manager_account_id := app_private.current_account_id();· if v_manager_account_id is null then raise exception using message = 'Authentication required'; end if;· select moderation_status into v_campaign_status from app_public.campaign where id = add_campaign_moderation_note.campaign_id;· if v_campaign_status is null then raise exception using message = 'Campaign not found'; end if;· if v_campaign_status <> 'pending' then raise exception using message = 'Moderation notes are allowed only for pending campaigns'; end if;· if length(trim(body)) = 0 then raise exception using message = 'Moderation note body is required'; end if;· insert into app_public.campaign_moderation_note ( campaign_id, manager_account_id, body ) values ( add_campaign_moderation_note.campaign_id, v_manager_account_id, trim(add_campaign_moderation_note.body) ) returning * into v_note;· return v_note; end; $$;· comment on function app_public.add_campaign_moderation_note(uuid, text) is '@name addCampaignModerationNote'; " at Object.<anonymous> (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/backend/tests/integration/campaign-moderation-note.spec.ts:9:17) at Promise.then.completed (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/utils.js:298:28) at new Promise (<anonymous>) at callAsyncCircusFn (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/utils.js:231:10) at _callCircusTest (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:316:40) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5) at _runTest (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:252:3) at _runTestsForDescribeBlock (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:126:9) at _runTestsForDescribeBlock (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:121:9) at run (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:71:3) at runAndTransformResultsToJestFormat (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/legacy-code-todo-rewrite/jestAdapterInit.js:122:21) at jestAdapter (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-circus/build/legacy-code-todo-rewrite/jestAdapter.js:79:19) at runTestInternal (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-runner/build/runTest.js:367:16) at runTest (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-runner/build/runTest.js:444:34) at Object.worker (/Users/bertrandlarsy/code/mutuity/node_modules/jest-runner/build/testWorker.js:106:12)

testcase.classname: claim settlement integration settles one claim atomically, closes siblings, records the Topes event, and stays idempotent
testcase.name: claim settlement integration settles one claim atomically, closes siblings, records the Topes event, and stays idempotent

testcase.classname: claim settlement integration handles concurrent settlement attempts safely with a single settlement event and no duplicate ledger side-effects
testcase.name: claim settlement integration handles concurrent settlement attempts safely with a single settlement event and no duplicate ledger side-effects

testcase.classname: resource bid integration issues expiring-soon warnings and expires/refunds open bids when the resource deadline passes
testcase.name: resource bid integration issues expiring-soon warnings and expires/refunds open bids when the resource deadline passes

testcase.classname: resource bid integration allows an authenticated non-owner to bid on an active resource and reuses the default token amount
testcase.name: resource bid integration allows an authenticated non-owner to bid on an active resource and reuses the default token amount

testcase.classname: resource bid integration allows proposed token amounts outside the resource intensity suggested range
testcase.name: resource bid integration allows proposed token amounts outside the resource intensity suggested range

testcase.classname: resource bid integration rejects new bids on expired resources
testcase.name: resource bid integration rejects new bids on expired resources

testcase.classname: resource bid integration lets the resource creator accept or decline bids and notifies bidders
testcase.name: resource bid integration lets the resource creator accept or decline bids and notifies bidders

testcase.classname: out-of-app delivery integration delivers a summary email only once the 3-day cadence is due
testcase.name: out-of-app delivery integration delivers a summary email only once the 3-day cadence is due

testcase.classname: out-of-app delivery integration respects the 1-day digest cadence window
testcase.name: out-of-app delivery integration respects the 1-day digest cadence window

testcase.classname: out-of-app delivery integration respects the 7-day digest cadence window
testcase.name: out-of-app delivery integration respects the 7-day digest cadence window

testcase.classname: out-of-app delivery integration respects the 30-day digest cadence window
testcase.name: out-of-app delivery integration respects the 30-day digest cadence window

testcase.classname: out-of-app delivery integration routes each managed category to exactly one out-of-app path and suppresses both paths when an account is active
testcase.name: out-of-app delivery integration routes each managed category to exactly one out-of-app path and suppresses both paths when an account is active

testcase.classname: out-of-app delivery integration queues and processes a push notification when a new resource is created for a realtime-push recipient
testcase.name: out-of-app delivery integration queues and processes a push notification when a new resource is created for a realtime-push recipient

testcase.classname: out-of-app delivery integration delivers one summary email containing resource, notification, need, and chat message items
testcase.name: out-of-app delivery integration delivers one summary email containing resource, notification, need, and chat message items

testcase.classname: bid settlement integration records reservation and bidder-cancel refund movements
testcase.name: bid settlement integration records reservation and bidder-cancel refund movements

testcase.classname: bid settlement integration refunds reserved Topes when the resource creator declines a bid
testcase.name: bid settlement integration refunds reserved Topes when the resource creator declines a bid

testcase.classname: bid settlement integration settles reserved Topes to the resource creator when a bid is accepted
testcase.name: bid settlement integration settles reserved Topes to the resource creator when a bid is accepted

testcase.classname: bid settlement integration keeps acceptance idempotent under concurrent retries without duplicate settlement movements
testcase.name: bid settlement integration keeps acceptance idempotent under concurrent retries without duplicate settlement movements

testcase.classname: bid settlement integration refunds reserved Topes when bid validity expires
testcase.name: bid settlement integration refunds reserved Topes when bid validity expires

testcase.classname: auth graphql operations supports authSession, authLogin, and authLogout with cookie-backed session state
testcase.name: auth graphql operations supports authSession, authLogin, and authLogout with cookie-backed session state

testcase.classname: auth graphql operations supports authenticated authChangePassword and invalidates old credentials
testcase.name: auth graphql operations supports authenticated authChangePassword and invalidates old credentials

testcase.classname: auth graphql operations supports local registration, immediate login, and one-time verification token usage
testcase.name: auth graphql operations supports local registration, immediate login, and one-time verification token usage

testcase.classname: auth graphql operations throttles verification resend without leaking account state
testcase.name: auth graphql operations throttles verification resend without leaking account state

testcase.classname: auth graphql operations enforces password-reset token one-time use and rejects forced-expired tokens
testcase.name: auth graphql operations enforces password-reset token one-time use and rejects forced-expired tokens

testcase.classname: auth graphql operations enforces external-identity link safety and blocks duplicate local registration on verified provider email
testcase.name: auth graphql operations enforces external-identity link safety and blocks duplicate local registration on verified provider email

testcase.classname: administrator-only role consolidation enforces administrator-only authorization across moderation, approval, grants, and admin support queries
testcase.name: administrator-only role consolidation enforces administrator-only authorization across moderation, approval, grants, and admin support queries

testcase.classname: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering claimer sees their sent claims and need creator sees their received claims
testcase.name: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering claimer sees their sent claims and need creator sees their received claims

testcase.classname: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering claims are returned with updatedAt and createdAt for client-side ordering
testcase.name: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering claims are returned with updatedAt and createdAt for client-side ordering

testcase.classname: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering multiple claims across needs are all returned in a single query
testcase.name: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering multiple claims across needs are all returned in a single query

testcase.classname: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering claims with different statuses are all readable (open, withdrawn, declined, settled)
testcase.name: claims-workspace: visibility and ordering claims with different statuses are all readable (open, withdrawn, declined, settled)

testcase.classname: claim-auto-decline: need expiry via worker open claims are auto-declined when the need expires, claimer receives claim_expired notification
testcase.name: claim-auto-decline: need expiry via worker open claims are auto-declined when the need expires, claimer receives claim_expired notification

testcase.classname: claim-auto-decline: need expiry via worker creator receives a batch need_expired_claims_declined notification
testcase.name: claim-auto-decline: need expiry via worker creator receives a batch need_expired_claims_declined notification

testcase.classname: claim-auto-decline: need expiry via worker already-declined claims are not double-declined by the expiry worker
testcase.name: claim-auto-decline: need expiry via worker already-declined claims are not double-declined by the expiry worker

testcase.classname: claim-auto-decline: need deactivation via mutation open claims are auto-declined when the need creator deactivates the need
testcase.name: claim-auto-decline: need deactivation via mutation open claims are auto-declined when the need creator deactivates the need

testcase.classname: claim-auto-decline: need deactivation via mutation expiry-driven deactivation does not trigger the deactivation trigger (no double notification)
testcase.name: claim-auto-decline: need deactivation via mutation expiry-driven deactivation does not trigger the deactivation trigger (no double notification)

testcase.classname: bids workspace integration returns sent/received bids ordered by latest status-change time and filters active bids
testcase.name: bids workspace integration returns sent/received bids ordered by latest status-change time and filters active bids

testcase.classname: profile and resource milestone rewards grants each profile completion reward at most once per account lifetime
testcase.name: profile and resource milestone rewards grants each profile completion reward at most once per account lifetime

testcase.classname: profile and resource milestone rewards grants first resource image and default Topes rewards at most once per resource lifetime
testcase.name: profile and resource milestone rewards grants first resource image and default Topes rewards at most once per resource lifetime

testcase.classname: resource search integration returns only active, non-expired resources ordered by closeness and creation recency
testcase.name: resource search integration returns only active, non-expired resources ordered by closeness and creation recency

testcase.classname: resource search integration applies tri-state filters to resource modality flags
testcase.name: resource search integration applies tri-state filters to resource modality flags

testcase.classname: resource search integration filters resources by the fixed system category codes
testcase.name: resource search integration filters resources by the fixed system category codes

testcase.classname: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) returns unlocated resources at end when favorLocalResources=true
testcase.name: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) returns unlocated resources at end when favorLocalResources=true

testcase.classname: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) filters out unlocated resources when favorLocalResources=false
testcase.name: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) filters out unlocated resources when favorLocalResources=false

testcase.classname: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) respects maxDistanceKm parameter and caps at system setting
testcase.name: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) respects maxDistanceKm parameter and caps at system setting

testcase.classname: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) excludes unlocated resources when maxDistanceKm is below the configured fallback distance
testcase.name: resource search integration proximity filtering (T094) excludes unlocated resources when maxDistanceKm is below the configured fallback distance

testcase.classname: campaign airdrop payouts pays each eligible account once per approved campaign and emits a notification
testcase.name: campaign airdrop payouts pays each eligible account once per approved campaign and emits a notification

testcase.classname: need create integration creates standalone need and campaign-linked pending need while enforcing Topes rules
testcase.name: need create integration creates standalone need and campaign-linked pending need while enforcing Topes rules

testcase.classname: need create integration updates need updatedAt when linked campaign_need status changes
testcase.name: need create integration updates need updatedAt when linked campaign_need status changes

testcase.classname: token gifting integration creates opposite ledger movements and notifies the recipient
testcase.name: token gifting integration creates opposite ledger movements and notifies the recipient

testcase.classname: need claim integration persists authenticated claims, creates a creator notification, and denies signed-out attempts
testcase.name: need claim integration persists authenticated claims, creates a creator notification, and denies signed-out attempts

testcase.classname: need search integration returns only active, non-expired needs ordered by weighted score and capped at 50 results
testcase.name: need search integration returns only active, non-expired needs ordered by weighted score and capped at 50 results

testcase.classname: need search integration applies maxDistanceKm to proximity filtering
testcase.name: need search integration applies maxDistanceKm to proximity filtering

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) claimer can cancel their own open claim, status becomes WITHDRAWN
testcase.name: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) claimer can cancel their own open claim, status becomes WITHDRAWN

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) need creator cannot cancel someone else's claim
testcase.name: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) need creator cannot cancel someone else's claim

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) cancelling an already-withdrawn claim is idempotent
testcase.name: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) cancelling an already-withdrawn claim is idempotent

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) cancellation sends a notification to the need creator
testcase.name: claims-settlement: cancel (claimer-side withdrawal) cancellation sends a notification to the need creator

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) need creator can decline an open claim on their need, status becomes DECLINED
testcase.name: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) need creator can decline an open claim on their need, status becomes DECLINED

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) claimer cannot decline their own claim
testcase.name: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) claimer cannot decline their own claim

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) declining an already-declined claim is idempotent
testcase.name: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) declining an already-declined claim is idempotent

testcase.classname: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) decline sends a notification to the claimer
testcase.name: claims-settlement: decline (creator-side) decline sends a notification to the claimer

testcase.classname: need claim contract exposes the claim mutation payload and notification shape through GraphQL
testcase.name: need claim contract exposes the claim mutation payload and notification shape through GraphQL

testcase.classname: claim settlement contract exposes the creator-only settlement mutation and resulting settlement state
testcase.name: claim settlement contract exposes the creator-only settlement mutation and resulting settlement state

testcase.name: campaign need triage integration allows campaign creator to accept or reject pending joined needs and blocks unauthorized transitions

testcase.name: unified operational logging coverage supports component filtering and shared context correlation across components

testcase.classname: unified operational logging coverage keeps application sources on unified write paths without legacy duplicate writers
testcase.name: unified operational logging coverage keeps application sources on unified write paths without legacy duplicate writers

testcase.classname: unified operational logging coverage deletes logs older than the configured retention window during scheduled cleanup

testcase.name: account deletion anonymization anonymizes account fields and revokes active sessions

testcase.classname: account deletion anonymization prevents deleted credentials from authenticating again
testcase.name: account deletion anonymization prevents deleted credentials from authenticating again

testcase.classname: account deletion anonymization stores an anonymized deleted account projection
testcase.name: account deletion anonymization stores an anonymized deleted account projection

testcase.classname: account deletion anonymization keeps historical need and campaign links consultable after deletion
testcase.name: account deletion anonymization keeps historical need and campaign links consultable after deletion

testcase.classname: account deletion anonymization emits deletion operational control events used by post-delete controls

testcase.classname: account deletion anonymization keeps deletion control events within configured retention cleanup windows
